task: Keep identical-input diff behavior stable while semantic workspace diff is added.
notes: Starter guard for the current diff contract.

task: Keep changed-module diff behavior stable while semantic workspace diff is added.
notes: Protects the current textual diff path.

task: Keep AST-backed diff behavior stable while semantic workspace diff is added.
notes: Protects the current AST diff path.

task: Add a semantic render mode that diffs the current semantic slices for form payload changes.
notes: Introduces `--form-mode semantic` on top of the current semantic-form slices.

task: Make the semantic diff CLI report per-slice hunks instead of one flattened blob.
verification:
bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/left" >/dev/null; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/right" >/dev/null; python3 - "$tmpdir/right/records/004-form.raw" <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
import sys
path = Path(sys.argv[1])
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
path.write_text(text.replace("\"Печать\"", "\"Печать2\"", 1), encoding="utf-8")
PY
uv run formbin diff "$tmpdir/left" "$tmpdir/right" --form-mode semantic > "$tmpdir/report.txt" || test $? -eq 1; python3 - "$tmpdir/report.txt" <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
import sys
text = Path(sys.argv[1]).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
assert "### semantic/form.meta.json" in text
assert "### semantic/strings.json" in text
assert "Печать2" in text
PY'
notes: CLI guard that the semantic diff output is grouped by semantic slice.
